overall.description: First-person exploration through a detailed gothic castle interior, transitioning from a dim library through corridors to a grand hall with a massive bifurcated staircase, ascending past students in wizard robes to a sunlit upper level. High-quality game engine rendering with cinematic lighting and ornate medieval architecture.

segments.scene_description: The camera enters a magnificent grand hall with a high vaulted ceiling, bifurcated marble staircase, and a central fountain with floating candles. Students in robes are scattered throughout the space as the camera begins ascending the stairs.

segments.scene_description: The camera continues ascending the staircase into brighter areas illuminated by tall gothic windows. Students pass by on the landings as the architecture reveals more ornate stonework and classical statues.

segments.scene_description: The camera reaches the top of the stairs and enters a bright upper hall with towering gothic windows, colorful house banners, and suits of armor. The space is illuminated by bright natural light as students gather near the walls and large wooden doors.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from the dim, enclosed atmosphere of a medieval library into the expansive, sun-drenched heights of a grand gothic hall. It begins by gliding past tall bookshelves and a large wooden table, moving through a stone archway into a darker corridor lined with heraldic shields. As the camera passes through a portrait gallery lit by wall sconces, the space opens up toward a bright light where a student in wizard robes appears, leading the way into a magnificent hall featuring a bifurcated marble staircase and floating candles. The scene then ascends the stairs, shifting from the shadowed lower levels to brighter areas illuminated by tall gothic windows and ornate stonework. Finally, the camera reaches the upper hall, where the environment transforms into a brilliant, light-filled space adorned with colorful house banners, suits of armor, and gathering students.
